## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `pnpm -r test` is green
- [ ] `pnpm lint` and `pnpm -r typecheck` pass
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this changes published behavior
- [ ] `vault-core` stays engine-only — no `.env`/CLI concepts leaked into it
- [ ] No real secret values appear in code, tests, or screenshots
